backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DJ Fizz backend — handles user profile storage, booking form submissions, and access-controlled query/update endpoints using AccessControl and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature request to remove authentication gates from AdminPage.tsx so the /admin route is publicly accessible without login.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and styling in the DJ Fizz site.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the DJ Fizz Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining the root layout with Header/Footer and two routes: HomePage at / and AdminPage at /admin.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying DJ Fizz's portrait photo with neon green glow border and bio copy, without stat counter cards.
frontend/src/components/AddOns.tsx: Premium add-ons section rendering five glass cards for lighting, audio, and projection services with neon green icon accents.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Eight-field booking inquiry form that submits event details to the Motoko backend via the useSubmitForm mutation, with loading, success, and error states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info, social links, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Placeholder Gallery component that renders an empty section element with the id 'gallery'.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with a logo, desktop and mobile nav links for smooth-scrolling sections, scroll-based background change, and an admin route button.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying a banner image with animated neon-green light beam overlays, a headline, subheadline, and CTA buttons that scroll to booking.
frontend/src/components/MoreThanMusic.ts: Section highlighting DJ Fizz's event-professional qualities through a two-column layout with descriptive copy and four icon-based pillar cards covering timeline management, crowd reading, planner coordination, and transitions.
frontend/src/components/SEOSection.tsx: SEO-focused section emphasizing DJ Fizz's Raleigh/Triangle service area with keyword-rich copy, three feature badges, and a 'Check Availability' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a four-card grid of DJ Fizz's service offerings (Weddings, Corporate Events, School Dances, Private Parties), each with an icon, description, and a booking scroll CTA.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials section with five hardcoded client reviews displayed in a responsive grid, each showing star ratings, quote text, and event details with a neon-green glass-card style.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state, persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all booking form submissions (useGetAllSubmissions) and submitting a new booking form (useSubmitForm) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with a dark neon-green theme via CSS variables, and defines custom utility classes for glow effects, glass cards, beam animations, and fade-in transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all booking form submissions in styled cards with event details, timestamps, and login/logout controls using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the public-facing home page by rendering all section components in order: Hero, About, Services, AddOns, MoreThanMusic, Gallery, Testimonials, SEOSection, and BookingForm.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (neon green, djblack palette, semantic tokens), fonts, shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes for the DJ Fizz site.
project_state.json: Tracks the current build state (version 27) of the DJ Fizz website project, including architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features with their requirements.
